name: Trial of Worth
description: Beyond the golem's reach, a chamber of polished stone presents three pedestals, each bearing a different offering — a crown, a sword, and a loaf of bread. An inscription on the wall reads: Only the worthy may pass. Choose what matters most, and the way shall open.
failureConsequence: You choose poorly, and the pedestals sink into the floor with a grinding finality. The chamber seals itself, and you must find another route through the ruins.
